name: com.x402disputes/x402-disputes
title: x402disputes.com - Permissionless X-402 Dispute Resolution
description: Permissionless dispute filing for X-402 USDC payments on Base and Solana. Agents file disputes directly. Dispute and refund data written on-chain.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token authentication using x402disputes API keys (starts with csk_live_ or csk_test_)
